message:
refactor(agent-detection): use readStreamSafe() for all process output reads

Replace all instances of `new Response(proc.stdout/stderr).text()` with
the new readStreamSafe() helper to prevent memory exhaustion:

- runInstalledCheck(): Use readStreamSafe with outputCapBytes limit
- findExecutable(): Use readStreamSafe with MAX_SAFE_OUTPUT_BYTES (1MB)
- getVersion(): Use readStreamSafe for both stdout and stderr
- checkAuth(): Use readStreamSafe for both stdout and stderr

This ensures all spawned process output is bounded to safe limits,
preventing denial-of-service scenarios where a misbehaving CLI
could produce unbounded output and exhaust memory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
